task.name: Web Frontend for Microecon Simulation
task.description: Replace DearPyGui visualization with a browser-based React/TypeScript frontend communicating with a FastAPI backend. Achieve feature parity with DearPyGui for live simulation mode, with improved styling flexibility and faster design iteration.

vision_extraction.primary_goal: Replace DearPyGui with browser-based TypeScript frontend while keeping Python simulation core
success_criteria: Identical simulation results (Python remains source of truth)
Modern, polished UI achievable via CSS/component libraries
Hot reload for faster design iteration
<100ms latency from Python tick to rendered frame
UI remains responsive during fast simulation

context.gap_analysis_summary: Complete serialization layer exists (all dataclasses have to_dict/from_dict). No web infrastructure exists - FastAPI backend and React frontend must be built from scratch. DearPyGui visualization code provides reference for features but cannot be directly reused.

phases.name: Infrastructure
phases.description: Backend skeleton, frontend scaffold, WebSocket connection, convenience script
phases.entry_criteria: Clean git state, existing tests pass
phases.exit_criteria: Frontend connects to backend via WebSocket, receives tick data, displays connection status

phases.name: Grid & Controls
phases.description: Canvas rendering of agents, simulation controls, metrics display
phases.exit_criteria: Agents render on grid with correct colors, controls work, trade animations visible

phases.name: Interaction
phases.description: Hover tooltips, click selection, agent details
phases.exit_criteria: Can hover for tooltips, click to select agents, see details in panel

phases.name: Charts
phases.description: Time-series charts for welfare and trade count
phases.exit_criteria: Charts update in real-time as simulation runs

phases.name: Overlays
phases.description: Toggleable visual overlays on the grid
phases.exit_criteria: All overlay toggles work, overlays render correctly

phases.name: Trade Inspection
phases.description: Edgeworth box modal for trade analysis
phases.exit_criteria: Can click trade to open Edgeworth box, see indifference curves and trade details

phases.name: Network Panel
phases.description: Trade network visualization with graph layouts
phases.exit_criteria: Network panel opens, both layouts work, visual encoding correct

features.name: FastAPI backend skeleton
features.description: Create backend/ directory with FastAPI app structure, __main__.py entry point

functional: backend/ directory exists with proper structure
python -m backend starts server on localhost:8000

features.name: Vite + React + TypeScript frontend scaffold
features.description: Create frontend/ directory with Vite, React, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui

functional: frontend/ directory exists with proper structure
npm run dev starts Vite on localhost:5173

features.name: WebSocket endpoint for simulation ticks
features.description: Implement /ws/simulation endpoint that streams TickRecord data as JSON

functional: Sends tick data when simulation running

features.name: REST endpoints for simulation control
features.description: Implement POST /api/simulation/start, /stop, /step, /reset endpoints

features.name: WebSocket connection hook
features.description: React hook useSimulationSocket for WebSocket connection and message handling

features.name: Zustand store setup
features.description: Create Zustand store for simulation state (agents, ticks, config, UI state)

functional: Actions for updating state from WebSocket
Selectors for components to access state

features.name: Convenience script
features.description: Script to start both backend and frontend with single command

functional: scripts/dev.sh or similar starts both processes

features.name: Add web dependencies to pyproject.toml
features.description: Add fastapi, uvicorn, websockets to core dependencies

features.name: Canvas grid rendering
features.description: Render grid background with lines on HTML canvas

features.name: Agent rendering
features.description: Render agents as colored circles, color based on alpha (red→blue)

functional: Agents appear at correct grid positions
Color correctly maps alpha to hue (0=red, 1=blue)

features.description: Slider to control simulation speed (ticks per second)

features.description: Toggle between force-directed and circular layouts

features.name: Network edge encoding
features.description: Edge thickness = trade frequency, color = recency

features.description: Show network metrics (density, clustering, avg degree)

features.name: Configuration modal UI

resolved.rationale: Simpler dev experience, hot reload for frontend, can wrap in Tauri/pywebview later if needed

resolved.choice: WebSocket for tick streaming, REST for commands
resolved.rationale: Low latency for simulation updates, simple request/response for controls
Lightweight, good TypeScript support, simpler than Redux

resolved.choice: Canvas 2D, upgrade to Pixi.js if performance issues
resolved.rationale: Sufficient for expected agent counts, simpler API
Simpler state management, sufficient for research use

resolved.choice: backend/ and frontend/ at project root

escalation_triggers: Test failures in simulation core (existing 669 tests must pass)
WebSocket connection architecture changes without discussion
Significant deviation from approved design sketches
Introduction of new Python dependencies beyond fastapi/uvicorn/websockets
